text:
cóunter・attàck-m'ænkάɪnd is the 5th track on the "Attack on Titan" Original Soundtrack. As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Title

The title is an approximate phonetical transcription of "counter attack mankind".

Musical motifs

The track is split into 2 parts. The first part (0:45-2:40) is a motif that appears in a few other tracks:

進撃vc-pf20130218巨人 (0:13-1:25)
ERENthe標 (3:37-5:50)
So ist es immer (1:06-1:30, 2:36-3:00 and 4:06-4:30)

The second part (3:03-6:05), which at 5:09-5:28 incorporates the Reluctant Heroes chorus, is also a motif used in a few other tracks:

進撃vc-pf20130218巨人 (1:25-1:55)
son2seaVer (2:24-3:06)
Occasionally, only the ominous glissando (3:03-3:23) is used.
